'''Rend 5''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Rend system/Legends|Rend system]] that suffered famine in approximately [[45 BBY/Legends|45 BBY]]. [[Jenna Zan Arbor]] created a synthetic source of nutrition which saved the populace.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Evil Experiment]]'' {{Mo}}
